auth.signupSub: No users yet. The first account becomes the master and controls everything.
auth.loginSub: Signup is closed. The master manages accounts from inside.
perm.title: Sandbox permissions
perm.sub: These map directly to agent_api convars. Changes apply live and persist across restarts.
perm.agent_api_readonly.label: Read-only mode
perm.agent_api_readonly.desc: Master kill-switch. When on, every mutating tool refuses.
perm.agent_api_allow_write_paths.label: Extra write roots
perm.agent_api_allow_write_paths.desc: Additional folders (relative to server data dir) the agent may write into.
perm.agent_api_allow_control_paths.label: Extra control roots
perm.agent_api_allow_control_paths.desc: Additional folders whose resources the agent may ensure/start/stop/restart.
perm.agent_api_rate_per_minute.label: Rate limit (req/min)
perm.agent_api_client_blocked_natives.de: Client natives client_call_native must always refuse.
perm.agent_api_server_blocked_natives.de: Extra server natives to refuse (on top of the built-in danger list).
perm.agent_api_shell_allowed_commands.de: Binaries run_shell may execute. Empty = default (npm,npx,pnpm,yarn,bun,vite,git,node).
perm.agent_api_plugin_esx_enabled.label: ESX plugin
perm.agent_api_plugin_oxmysql_readonly.d: When on, oxmysql tools only allow SELECT.
perm.agent_api_plugin_oxmysql_allow_stat: Uppercase SQL verbs the agent may run, e.g. SELECT,INSERT,UPDATE,DELETE.
perm.agent_api_plugin_esx_blocked_method: xPlayer/ESX method names esx_call_* must refuse.
perm.agent_api_plugin_oxlib_blocked_meth: ox_lib server export names oxlib_call must refuse.
users.title: Users
users.sub: Only the master can create or remove accounts. There is no public signup once the master exists.
